title: Better Endgame Equip
description: A mod that adds new content to grind after the end
body:
# Better Endgame Equip
A mod that adds new content to grind after the end.\
It tries to continue the Vanilla Endgame, so don't expect crazy op stuff.
## 📜Content:
- 1x New Ore
- 2x New Smithing Templates
- 2x New Armor & Tool Sets
- 1x New End Structure + Loot Table
- 4x New Advancements (+1 Hidden)
- 2x New Blocks
## ℹ️Guide:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Get in the Outer End
2. Get Elytra (recommended)
3. Find a Mystical Smithing Template in the new Structure
4. Find the Mystical Cluster Ore under the big End Islands
5. Farm the Ore by rocketing up into the bottom of the Islands and placing Water under the Ore
6. Smelt Mystical Cluster to Mystical Plates in a Blasting Furnace
7. Craft 6 Mystical Plates, 2 Dragons Breath and 1 Netherite Ingot into 1 Mystical Ingot
8. Upgrade your Netherite Armor & Tools to Mystical Tier with 1 Mystical Ingot and Smithing Template each
9. Craft 7 Netherite Scrap, 1 Ghast Tear and 1 Mystical Template into 1 Holy Smithing Template
10. Upgrade 1 Mystical Ingot with 1 Nether Star and Holy Smithing Template
11. Upgrade your Mystical Armor & Tools to Holy Tier with 1 Holy Ingot and Smithing Template

</details>

## 🧩Compatability:

- This mod should be compatible with all other forge mods in 1.20.1.

- Both armor sets should be trimmable by custom Armor Trims.\
- One of the chests from the double hest in the End Station Structure uses a Vanilla Loot Table so you might find Items from other mods that edit this specific Loot Table (minecraft:end_city_treasure).\
- The armor stats might be worse than stats from cheaper armors added by other mods.\
I will try to add a config file in the future so you can edit the armor stats yourself.

## 👍Recommendation:
[Overflowing Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars)
